extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: I excluded all “By” rows and counted only “Against” rows. Criminal proceedings against were 2 for promoters and 1 for group companies, while statutory/regulatory proceedings against were 5 for the company, 11 for promoters and 1 for group companies; tax proceedings against the company and group companies were 4 and 10 respectively, kept separate from regulatory matters. For the company-and-subsidiaries aggregate amount, the explicitly stated company amount of ₹105.90 lakhs is the only quantified amount attributable to the company or a subsidiary; the ₹1,242.43 lakhs for group companies was not treated as a subsidiary amount because subsidiaries are not identified. The contingent-liabilities figure is the stated Total of ₹64.68 lakhs as of June 30, 2025, not a re-sum. Company-wide top-customer concentration is 92.82% of revenue from operations for the full fiscal year ended March 31, 2025 for the top 10 customers; no company-wide top-five percentage is disclosed. Monetary tables use ₹ in lakhs, converted to crore by dividing by 100: ₹105.90 lakhs = ₹1.059 crore and ₹64.68 lakhs = ₹0.6468 crore.
